signals.headline: Iran's Parliament Accuses U
signals.raw:
Iran's Parliament Accuses U.S. of Bad Faith | NO | HIGH confidence**

Iran's parliament speaker Mohammad Bagher Qalibaf stated the U.S. "was unable to gain the trust of the Iranian delegation" and said Iran must now decide whether the U.S. can earn trust.[1] Iran's state media blamed U.S. demands for preventing agreement.[5]
